title: Section 228
content: When a will has been proved and deposited in a Court of competent jurisdiction situated beyond the limits of the State, whether within or beyond the limits of 1[India], and a properly authenticated copy of the will is produced, letters of administration may be granted with a copy of such copy annexed.
footnote: 1. Subs. by A.O. 1950, for "His Majesty's" Domination.
